scope: Walking demo (R1) at commit head of main

security.notes: No backend; key never leaves the device except as x-api-key header to api.anthropic.com (asserted by unit test). No analytics, no third-party JS. Google Fonts CSS only.

quality.notes: TypeScript strict mode, 53/53 unit tests, production bundle 119 KB gzipped (budget 500 KB). No source emoji (operator preference). lucide-only iconography.

testing.notes: Curriculum invariants, anthropic client contract, state reducer covered. Component-level UI tests deferred to TD-03.

ops.notes: Two-target deploy in place: GitHub Pages via Actions + AWS S3 via deploy-s3.mjs. Both URLs 200.

compliance.notes: Privacy posture documented in README and Help page; no PII collected, no cookies set.

findings.summary: S3 website endpoint is HTTP-only; consider CloudFront + ACM cert for HTTPS.
Account-level BlockPublicPolicy disabled to enable public bucket policy; consider CloudFront + OAC to restore the account default.
Component-level UI tests not yet present (Playwright smoke covers the happy path).

rationale: Walking demo meets all eighteen requirements with executed-test evidence. Outstanding items are deferred enhancements, not defects.
